headline: 3 Stocks to Buy During the Hormuz Crisis — and Why
summary: War in Iran has turned the Strait of Hormuz into a global flashpoint — and with it, roughly 20% of the world’s oil supply is now at risk. Most investors are playing it the obvious way. But oil prices are unpredictable, as Monday’s near-30% reversal proved. The real opportunity is in stocks that win no matter where crude goes. 1.
